purpose: Separate audible special-mora variation from true learner-facing pronunciation issues.
guidelines: Audible variation is not the same as a pronunciation error.
Natural or acceptable variation should not reduce practice_score.
communication_impact none/minor should not create strong user-facing correction.
Only clear/severe impact with should_feedback=yes can become a user-facing candidate.
For the C-end product, feedback_strength=correction is not used yet; use gentle_tip or practice_focus at most.
near_boundary and mild variation are accepted by default.
